preferences.title: Preferences

preferences.advanced.apiConfig.title: API Configuration
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.endpointD: The base URL for API requests
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.timeoutDe: Maximum time to wait for API responses
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.retriesDe: Number of times to retry failed requests
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.debugMode: Enable verbose logging for API requests
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.error.api: API key must be at least 10 characters
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.error.tim: Timeout must be at least 1 second
preferences.advanced.apiConfig.error.ret: Retry count must be at least 0

crashReport.title: Crash Report
crashReport.description: The application encountered a crash. Would you like to send a crash report to help us fix the issue?
crashReport.privacyNote: Crash reports include error details, stack traces, and app version. No personal data is collected.
crashReport.consentGranted: Crash reporting enabled. Future crashes will be reported automatically.
crashReport.consentError: Failed to update crash reporting settings
preferences.advanced.crashReporting.desc: Send crash reports to help improve the app
preferences.advanced.crashReporting.cons: Allow sending anonymous crash reports when the app encounters errors
preferences.advanced.crashReporting.notC: Crash reporting is not configured. Set VITE_SENTRY_DSN environment variable to enable.
errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: The application encountered an unexpected error. Your data has been saved automatically.
